title: Whimscape + Exploration
description: This resource pack brings a bundle of mods focused on exploration for the Whimscape style!
body:
![hero image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/310b15045afaa3eb79ba65531a6f7ecbfe5e479b.png)
Whimscape + Exploration brings a bundle of mods focused on exploration for the Whimscape style!

Currently:
- [Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts)
- [Better Archeology](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-archeology)
- [Nature's Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-compass)
- [Explore's Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/explorers-compass)
- [Portal Linking Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/portal-linking-compass) *NEW*
- [Ribbits](https://modrinth.com/mod/ribbits) *NEW*
- [Lootr](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootr)
- ~~Waystones~~ (Removed. Now on Whimscape)
- [Wraith Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/fwaystones)

(Use the Waystone mod you prefer.)

I highly recommend using [Whimscape x Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape-x-trinkets) by Xenorie.

Let me know if there are any other mod you would like to see included in this bundle.

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/723658dd096a73519172011b53b018d4ae5af359.png)

[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0221659674db6d9cf193d45580de83d3db6795d.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape "Get Whimscape here")
[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc01db18768007d3783f5268f00cb62846b14e1a.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape-x-cobblemon "Cobblemon add-on")
